
:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="25%"}
![](profile.jpg){width=100% style="border-radius: 50%;margin-right: 30px;"}
:::

::: {.column width="75%"}



---
title: "Public Health & Data Insights"
---

I transform health data into actionable insights to support  
evidence-based decisions and improve population health outcomes.

I also share insights and reflections on public health issues through  
writings, combining data analysis with critical perspectives on  
health policy and population challenges.

[📧 Email](mailto:amanda.dmaharani@gmail.com) | 🔗 [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/amandadiahm)


:::

::::

---

## About Me

I am a medical doctor and public health postgraduate student with a strong interest in epidemiology, biostatistics, and health data analysis.

My work focuses on transforming complex health datasets into meaningful insights that inform policy and intervention strategies.

---

## Selected Projects

### [Global Life Expectancy Analysis](analysis.qmd)
- Visualized life expectancy 
- Compared life expectancy among selected countries 


---

### COVID-19 Vaccination Trend Analysis
- Analyzed vaccination trends across regions  
- Identified disparities in coverage  
- Highlighted priority areas for intervention  
  

---

### Risk Factor Analysis for Non-Communicable Diseases
- Explored associations between lifestyle and disease risk  
- Identified key predictors  
- Provided prevention insights  
  

---

### Health Inequality Analysis
- Compared outcomes across demographic groups  
- Identified socioeconomic disparities  
- Suggested data-driven recommendations
